entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY THIS EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH THIS EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE

PARTLY SUNNY
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
CALM WINDS, BECOMING EAST AROUND 5 MPH IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE EVENING, THEN A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
HUMID WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 90S
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 105 IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
HOT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 70S
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 90S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
